tasks.title: Extend variables.css with dark mode CSS variables
tasks.description: Duplicate light theme variables with dark equivalents. Define --bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --text-primary, etc. for dark theme under [data-theme='dark'] selector
acceptance_criteria: AC-F13-4: All components work in dark theme

tasks.title: Create useTheme.ts composable
tasks.description: detect system prefers-color-scheme, apply theme class to <html>, persist choice to localStorage.theme, expose toggleTheme() function

tasks.title: Create ThemeToggle.vue component
tasks.description: Sun/Moon icon toggle button. Uses useTheme composable. Place in AppHeader.vue

tasks.title: Create GET /api/changelog backend endpoint
tasks.description: New router /routers/changelog.py. Returns {version: string, changelog_items: [{text: string, type: 'feature'|'fix'|'doc'}]}. Version from config/environment

tasks.title: Create WhatsNewModal.vue component
tasks.description: Modal with version title + changelog list. Fetches /api/changelog on mount. Checks localStorage.lastSeenVersion vs current version. Shows on mismatch
acceptance_criteria: AC-F12-1: Modal appears on first visit after P19
AC-F12-2: Shows version and changelog items
AC-F12-3: Dismissible, won't reappear until next version

tasks.title: Integrate WhatsNewModal into App.vue
tasks.description: On App mount, check version and show modal if needed. Update localStorage.lastSeenVersion on dismiss
acceptance_criteria: AC-F12-3: Persists dismissed state across reloads

tasks.title: Create feishu_webhook.py notification service
tasks.description: Service module for sending Feishu message cards. Takes payload (title, body, type), sends POST to FEISHU_WEBHOOK_URL. Fire-and-forget with try/except and logging
acceptance_criteria: AC-F17-4: Webhook failure doesn't break main operation

tasks.title: Add FEISHU_WEBHOOK_URL to config.py
tasks.description: Add Optional[str] field for webhook URL. Load from FEISHU_WEBHOOK_URL env var

tasks.title: Trigger webhook on memory write operations
tasks.description: In agentmemory.py router: after POST/PUT/DELETE success, call feishu_webhook.send() with appropriate message card. Types: create=🆕 New Memory, update=✏️ Updated Memory, delete=🗑️ Deleted Memory

tasks.title: Add POST /api/webhook/feishu/test endpoint
tasks.description: Test connectivity endpoint. Sends a test message card to verify webhook URL is valid
acceptance_criteria: AC-F17-5: Test endpoint sends a test card
